results.title: Mortgage rates hit highest level since war began
results.description: The interest rate on a 30-year, fixed-rate mortgage rose Thursday to its highest level since the war began, upending several weeks of steady rates as the U.S.-Israeli war with Iran approached its third month without significant progress toward peace.

results.title: Female Dogs and Directors Dominate Palm Dog Awards
results.description: Two films, two women directors, two female dogs. Sometimes the festival writes its own thematic through-lines. The Palm Dog — the beloved unofficial awards show celebrating the best canine performances across the festival’s official selection and various sidebars — has long since become a genuine Cannes fixture, founded by Toby Rose back in 2001. results.title: Filing ITR this year? Know about your AIS and check carefully to avoid tax notices
